summary: Tested all 11 frontend features requested: floor names, room names, quest card hierarchy, reset sprint button, selected tasks receipt, music toggle placement, loadout loading, building lights, launch mission, and tracking mode task cards.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Quest cards in Planning Mode show 'Overall Body Mastery' as the primary goal name for ALL quest variants under the same goal (e.g., 6 cards all showing 'Overall Body Mastery'). This is by design per the requirements (goal.name is primary), but UX-wise could look repetitive. No action needed unless UX feedback dictates otherwise.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 features verified working: 6 new floor names, updated room names, goal.name as primary bold text on quest cards (both Planning and Tracking mode), Reset Sprint button near EP tracker with red hover, Selected Tasks Receipt below building, Music toggle in top nav (both modes), FOUNDER GRIND loadout works, Launch Mission enters tracking mode correctly. App is localStorage-based, no backend. Start at welcome screen -> ENTER HQ -> Planning Mode.
